tracks.rawText: 2:15Fuego en Silenciov5.5CoverLatin pop ballad with acoustic instrumentation, A nylon-string acoustic guitar plays syncopated fingerstyle patterns and percussive slaps on the body, A female vocalist performs with a bright, expressive tone, utilizing melismatic runs and dynamic shifts from breathy chest voice to powerful belts, The arrangement is minimalist, focusing on the interplay between the rhythmic guitar strumming and the vocal melody, 105 BPM, Key of G Major, 4/4 time signature4PublishRemix
tracks.title: Fuego en Silencio

tracks.rawText: 4:03Com Amorv5.5Psytrance track with prehispanic Mexican tribal influences, highly rhythmic and hypnotic, magical atmosphere, BPM 145, driving and energetic groove, Prominent ancient flutes like quena and ocarina with rich melodies, fast patterns and layered harmonies, Strong tribal percussion like huehuetl and teponaztli with complex rhythmic patterns, Deep rolling psytrance bassline, psychedelic effects, echo, reverb, and spatial movement, Jungle ambience, wind sounds, and mystical textures, Ritual chanting elements, The vibe should feel like a powerful ancient ceremony in the jungle under the stars, deeply hypnotic, spiritual, magical and energetic2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Com Amor
